title: nephrodium denticulatum subsp. rigidissimum
intro: Nephrodium denticulatum subsp. rigidissimum, also known as the rigid fir polypody, is a subspecies of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. The medicinal properties of this plant are attributed to its high content of flavonoids, which have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Nephrodium denticulatum subsp. rigidissimum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and can be used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and skin problems.
